# Lookitry - AI Virtual Try-On Platform for E-Commerce

Lookitry is a B2B SaaS platform that enables brands to integrate an AI-powered virtual try-on widget into their online stores. Customers can upload a selfie and visualize how clothing, accessories, and footwear would look on them before making a purchase.

**Website:** https://lookitry.com  
**API:** https://api.lookitry.com  
**Project Location:** C:\Users\Matt\Lookitry

## Technology Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|------------|
| Frontend | Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS |
| Backend | Node.js + Express |
| Database | Supabase (PostgreSQL) |
| Storage | MinIO (S3-compatible) |
| AI Orchestration | n8n |
| AI Models | OpenRouter |
| Payments | Wompi (COP), PayPal (USD) |

## Core Features

### Virtual Try-On System
- Embeddable iframe widget for e-commerce integration
- AI-generated images showing products on user's body
- Selfie upload with real-time processing
- Multiple widget templates (Bare, MinimalTopBar, ModernSidebar, BoldProStudio)

### Product Catalog Management
- Full CRUD operations for products
- Image upload and compression
- Category auto-mapping
- External ID support for WooCommerce sync

### Subscription Plans
| Plan | Price (COP/month) | Products | Generations/Month |
|------|-------------------|----------|---------------------|
| TRIAL | $20,000 (one-time) | 1 | 15 |
| BASIC | $150,000 | 5 | 400 |
| PRO | $250,000 | 15 | 1,200 |
| ENTERPRISE | $800,000 | 50 | 2,000 |

### Payment Integration
- Wompi for Colombian pesos (COP)
- PayPal for international payments (USD) with dynamic TRM conversion
- Automatic proration for plan upgrades
- Additional credits purchase

## Project Structure

```
LOOKITRY/
├── frontend/                    # Next.js 14 App
│   ├── src/app/                # Pages (App Router)
│   │   ├── dashboard/         # User dashboard pages
│   │   ├── admin/             # Admin dashboard pages
│   │   ├── checkout/          # Checkout flows
│   │   └── [slug]/           # Dynamic routes
│   ├── src/components/        # React components
│   │   ├── dashboard/         # Dashboard components
│   │   ├── tryon/             # Try-on widget components
│   │   └── ui/                # Shared UI components
│   └── src/services/          # API clients
├── backend/                     # Express API
│   ├── src/controllers/       # Business logic
│   ├── src/routes/            # API routes
│   ├── src/services/         # External integrations
│   ├── src/middleware/       # Auth, rate limiting
│   └── src/config/           # Configuration
├── lookitry-woocommerce/      # WordPress plugin
├── supabase/migrations/       # Database migrations
└── scripts/                   # Deployment scripts
```

## API Endpoints

### Authentication (`/api/auth`)
- POST /register - Brand registration with Turnstile
- POST /login - Login with JWT
- POST /forgot-password - Password reset
- GET /verify-email - Email verification
- POST /resend-verification - Resend verification email

### Brands (`/api/brands`)
- GET /me - Get current brand
- PUT /me - Update brand profile
- POST /change-password - Change password

### Products (`/api/products`)
- GET / - List products
- POST / - Create product
- PUT /:id - Update product
- DELETE /:id - Delete product

### Generations (`/api/generations`)
- POST / - Create try-on generation
- GET / - List generations
- GET /:id - Get generation status

### Payments (`/api/payments`)
- GET /wompi/config - Wompi configuration
- POST /wompi/webhook - Wompi webhook handler
- POST /paypal/create-order - PayPal order
- POST /addon - Purchase additional credits

### Subscriptions (`/api/subscription`)
- GET /info - Get subscription info
- POST /upgrade - Upgrade plan
- POST /cancel - Cancel subscription

## Database Schema

### Core Tables
- **brands**: Client brands with plan, subscription status, customization
- **products**: Brand products with images and descriptions
- **generations**: Try-on generation records with status tracking
- **payments**: Payment history and transaction records
- **promotions**: Marketing campaigns and coupons

## Authentication

- Custom JWT system (not Supabase Auth)
- HTTP-only secure cookies (30-day expiration)
- Cloudflare Turnstile for spam protection
- Password requirements: 8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special

## Admin Dashboard

Available at `/admin`:
- Brand management
- Subscription management
- Payment history and revenue analytics
- Product catalog oversight
- AI cost monitoring
- Blog content management
- Promotions and coupons

## User Dashboard

Available at `/dashboard`:
- Products management
- Generation history
- Usage statistics
- Subscription management
- Mini-landing editor
- Profile settings

## Design System

- Primary color: #FF5C3A (Lookitry Orange)
- Background: #0a0a0a (dark), #f5f5ee (light)
- Typography: Plus Jakarta Sans (titles), DM Sans (body)
- Icons: lucide-react only (no emojis)

## WooCommerce Integration

WordPress plugin available in `lookitry-woocommerce/` with:
- API key validation
- Product synchronization
- Modal with iframe integration
- Button injection support

## n8n Workflows

| Function | Webhook |
|----------|---------|
| Try-On Generation | /webhook/tryon |
| Product Descriptor | /webhook/descriptor |

## Key Configuration

- `backend/src/config/plans.ts` - Plan definitions
- `backend/src/config/supabase.ts` - Database config
- `frontend/tailwind.config.ts` - Styling config
- Environment variables in `.env` files

---

*For detailed API documentation, see backend route files in `backend/src/routes/`*
